documentation.description:
------------------------------------------------------------------

  chelper.ads -- Provides additional C data types not in Interfaces.C.
                 Also provides for the type Interfaces.C.Strings those
                 operations available for manipulating Ada strings in
                 Ada.Strings.Fixed.

  Copyright (c) 1995-2000 Terry J. Westley

  See the file "license.htm" for information on usage and
  redistribution of this file, and for a DISCLAIMER OF ALL WARRANTIES.

------------------------------------------------------------------

array_types.name: Int_Array
array_types.code: type Int_Array is array (C.int range <>) of C.int;

access_types.name: Double_Ptr
access_types.code: type Double_Ptr is access all C.double;

access_types.name: Int_Ptr
access_types.code: type Int_Ptr is access all C.int;

access_types.name: Int_Ptr_Ptr
access_types.code: type Int_Ptr_Ptr is access all Int_Ptr;

access_types.name: Long_Ptr
access_types.code: type Long_Ptr is access all C.long;

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left, Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr) return String

function "&"
  (Left  : C.Strings.chars_ptr;
   Right : String)
   return  String

function "&"
  (Left  : String;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  String

function "*"
  (Left  : Natural;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  C.Strings.chars_ptr

function "*"
  (Left  : Natural;
   Right : Character)
   return  C.Strings.chars_ptr

function "*"
  (Left  : Natural;
   Right : String)
   return  C.Strings.chars_ptr
function "<" (Left, Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr) return Boolean

function "<"
  (Left  : C.Strings.chars_ptr;
   Right : String)
   return  Boolean

function "<"
  (Left  : String;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  Boolean
function "<=" (Left, Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr) return Boolean

function "<="
  (Left  : C.Strings.chars_ptr;
   Right : String)
   return  Boolean

function "<="
  (Left  : String;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  Boolean
function "=" (Left, Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr) return Boolean

function "="
  (Left  : C.Strings.chars_ptr;
   Right : String)
   return  Boolean

function "="
  (Left  : String;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  Boolean
function ">" (Left, Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr) return Boolean

function ">"
  (Left  : C.Strings.chars_ptr;
   Right : String)
   return  Boolean

function ">"
  (Left  : String;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  Boolean
function ">=" (Left, Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr) return Boolean

function ">="
  (Left  : C.Strings.chars_ptr;
   Right : String)
   return  Boolean

function ">="
  (Left  : String;
   Right : C.Strings.chars_ptr)
   return  Boolean
